---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or enhancement
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do, and what's getting in the way? Describe the use case,
not just the solution.

## Proposed solution

What you'd like Pulsate to do. Include config/CLI sketches if relevant.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you evaluated and why they fall short.

## Scope

<!-- Substantial changes (new subsystems, config-format or ABI changes,
security-sensitive features) should go through the RFC process — see
docs/18-open-source.md. -->

Is this a small change, or does it warrant an RFC?

## Additional context

Links, prior art, or related issues.
